form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign tenth of 14 at Sha Tin Rating 40 December 29 2024 over 1400m, 6 len behind Regency Happy Star with 59kg at $58. Previously first up; second last of 11 at Sha Tin October 1 2024 over 1400m, 10 len behind The Khan with 60.5kg at $15. Watch the market.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping shifted out abruptly and lost ground.

form.formComment: Gelding by Earthlight on debut. Won a jump-out at Pakenham on April 7. Strong chance to break through. Looks all set to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Earthlight on debut. Won a jump-out at Pakenham on April 7. Strong chance to break through. Looks all set to run well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Finished off last preparation third of 9 at Cranbourne 3yo Mdn-Sw January 22 over 1400m, 1.3 len behind Nostro Roccia with 58kg at $3.60. On debut second of 9 at Cranbourne 3yo Mdn-Sw December 5 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Talladega Girl carrying 58kg at $13. Can improve this time in and will take beating.

form.formComment: Gelding by Frankel on debut. Fitter for a jump-out on March 30 at Cranbourne when finished fifth. Did not show a great deal at the trials and prefer to see in a race before backing.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, nose behind Fiveminutewarning with 59kg at $2.50. Well placed to go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Was well-supported at debut, tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, nose behind Fiveminutewarning with 59kg at $2.50. Well placed to go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid outwards under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 10 at Towong Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1200m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Hidden Bay with 55kg at $26. Second run from a spell ran last of 7 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on April 10 over 1212m, slow going 7 len behind Col Klink carrying 54kg at $101. Best of the rest.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up sat on the pace before fading 8th of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Listening Is Doing with 57.5kg at $151. Last start second last of 8 at this track 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1100m, in the wet; 5 len behind Tillya Tepe carrying 58kg at $41. Can't entertain on that form.

form.formComment: Resuming off ten months break after having had one race start. At debut last start 4th of 11 at Sale 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 25 over 1113m, on rain affected going; 4.5 len behind Lamassu with 56kg at $11. Had three recent trials to get fit for this. Last trial was second in a 950m barrier trial on April 9 at Traralgon. Capable of a bold return.
